subcodes.first_line: The heavens have been rent asunder, the earth hath been cleft, and the mountains have passed away, yet the people remain heedless and in dissension [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انفطرت السماء و انشقت الارض و مرت الجبال و لکن الناس فی غفله و شقاق قد طافت
subcodes.subjects: @apocalyptic imagery, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized)
